text.message: I love making bad placement decisions
Leaving the board open gets me goign!
Omg, blue ruined my entire gameplan
I might still take the sheep port
Just out of curiosity, how do you make the first placement going last and not know exactly what you are doing after?
I just had to make a judgement call
i got double plowed as well
It’s not a plow when we are choosing settles
i have less cards now than when i started, and I haven't done anything
oj robbing me while red has city is wild
def need to be hitting red and green
I’d love to you hit me lol
i'm soloing for sure if you steal
If you just said yes, I would have given you something in return blue!
only goal is to make you lose!
That is smart to change your goal though, no way your setup can win
well obviously after double plow and gangrobbed and no rolls
No not any of that blue
i've produced +3 cards since the beginning
Your setup in general is really bad placements
You just made bad choices and thats ok
I will give you my next card since you solo’d me when I was on 0 cards
no wonder red has 23% win rate
red gunna leave this game thinking he made any decisions to win, and wasn't fed from dice
No this is a game of luck
The only skill is where you place
I just happened to avoid the two spots you placed
red you might actually win one
get back to at least 25% bro
Im just out here having fun
Just felt like annoying blue with how much he was complaining
